headline: I tested several cases for the Switch 2 and these are the best
summary: Cases offer protection and peace of mind for your Switch 2. I tested various options to find the top performers. Discover the best cases to safeguard your new console.

headline: Musk v. Altman: Much ado about nothing
summary: The Musk v. Altman trial was a chaotic event. The courthouse was described as a "zoo" with daily protests. Despite big personalities, the trial amounted to little.

headline: Anthropic is paying $15 billion a year for access to Elon Musk’s data centers
summary: SpaceX and Anthropic formed a compute partnership. Anthropic will access SpaceX's Colossus data centers. SpaceX's IPO filing reveals a $15 billion annual payment.

headline: Netflix’s next great sci-fi show is set in a retirement community
summary: Netflix's new series, 'The Boroughs,' embraces 80s sci-fi tropes. It features an otherworldly threat faced by a group. This unique take is set within a retirement community.

headline: Blizzard Admits It Messed Up Overwatch’s 10th Anniversary Event
summary: Blizzard acknowledges backlash over Overwatch's 10th Anniversary event. The company admits to making mistakes with the event. Despite issues, Blizzard states it's "happy with where the game is today."

headline: Fallout 4 on Consoles Will Soon Let You Add More Mods
summary: Bethesda confirms increased mod storage for Fallout 4 on consoles. Players will gain more space for Creations downloads. This update allows for a richer modding experience.

headline: Pokémon Company Considers ID Check to Combat Card Scalping in Japan
summary: The Pokémon Company plans ID verification for trading cards in Japan. The system aims to fight scalping and cheating. Japan's "My Number" card would be utilized for verification.

headline: Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 Trailer Shows Toph Mentoring Aang
summary: Netflix released the official trailer for Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2. The trailer features Toph Beifong mentoring Aang. Season 2 is set to premiere on June 25, 2026.

headline: VAT to be cut for some attractions this summer
summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves announced measures to ease cost-of-living pressures. VAT will be cut for certain attractions this summer. This will lead to cheaper theme park tickets and children's meals.

headline: Late Queen was 'very keen' for Andrew to be given trade envoy role
summary: Newly released documents reveal Queen Elizabeth's wishes. The Queen desired Prince Andrew to have a "prominent role." She was "very keen" on him becoming a trade envoy.

headline: NHS trust sacks staff over accessing Nottingham attacks victims' records
summary: Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust has fired employees. Staff were sacked for improperly accessing victim records. Investigations into the incidents are still ongoing.

headline: UK migration drops to 171,000 - almost half 2024's figure
summary: UK migration figures have fallen significantly. The number dropped to 171,000, nearly half of 2024's total. The Prime Minister claims the government is restoring border control.
